summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of WhatsApp bidirectional flow for CRM Fakulti. All 20 tests PASSED. Verified: Meta webhook for text/image/audio/sticker messages, status updates silently ignored, legacy webhook conversation flow, CRM agent reply endpoint, chat history storage, session management, lead auto-creation, data extraction, and stage progression.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms all fixes from main agent are correctly implemented:
1. Meta Graph API v25.0 is used in WHATSAPP_API_URL constant
2. Non-text messages (image, audio, video, document, sticker, location, contacts) are handled correctly in whatsapp_incoming webhook
3. Status updates (delivery receipts) are silently ignored with 'if value.get("statuses"): continue'
4. Session meta stores resolved lead_name instead of empty string
5. Legacy webhook endpoint stores messages and session meta correctly
6. send_whatsapp_message accepts both 200 AND 201 status codes
seed_data_creation: Test leads created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp bidirectional flow fully tested and working. Key verified features: 1) POST /api/webhook/whatsapp handles Meta format with text/image/audio/sticker/location/contacts messages, 2) Status updates are silently ignored, 3) POST /api/whatsapp/webhook legacy endpoint works for full conversation flow, 4) Bot remembers context across turns (anti-amnesia), 5) Lead auto-creation with source=WhatsApp and funnel_stage=nuevo, 6) Data extraction (name, city, product_interest) works via AI, 7) Stage progression from nuevo to interesado works, 8) GET/PUT /api/config/whatsapp endpoints work, 9) POST /api/chat/whatsapp-reply requires auth and validates lead_id, 10) Chat history stored correctly for wa_ sessions, 11) Sessions list includes WhatsApp sessions with lead_name. WhatsApp Cloud API is NOT configured in preview environment so actual WA sends are skipped but all processing logic works correctly.

verified_features.meta_webhook_text: PASS - POST /api/webhook/whatsapp handles text messages from new numbers
verified_features.meta_webhook_status: PASS - POST /api/webhook/whatsapp silently ignores status updates
verified_features.legacy_webhook_context: PASS - Bot remembers name across 4+ turns
verified_features.crm_reply_send: PASS - POST /api/chat/whatsapp-reply processes correctly (WA not configured)
verified_features.chat_history: PASS - GET /api/chat/history/{session_id} returns messages for wa_ sessions
verified_features.chat_sessions: PASS - GET /api/chat/sessions includes WhatsApp sessions with lead_name
verified_features.lead_auto_creation: PASS - New WhatsApp number creates lead with source=WhatsApp, funnel_stage=nuevo
verified_features.name_extraction: PASS - Bot extracts name from conversation
verified_features.city_extraction: PASS - Bot extracts city from conversation
verified_features.product_interest_extraction: PASS - Bot extracts product_interest from conversation
verified_features.stage_progression: PASS - funnel_stage updates based on conversation

ai_bot_verification.fluidity: Bot responds naturally in Spanish with appropriate tone
ai_bot_verification.intelligence: Bot extracts data (name, city, product_interest) and classifies stages
ai_bot_verification.anti_amnesia: Bot maintains context across multiple turns without repeating questions
